title: Mariona Rebull
writer: Ignasi Agustí, José Luis Sáenz de Heredia
actors: José María Seoane, Blanca de Silos, Sara Montiel
plot: Barcelona: the late nineteenth century. The textile businessman Joaquín Rius falls in love with a young woman named Mariona Rebull. Happiness seems to fill the life of married Rius, until Ernesto Villar, a friend of Joaquín and an...
